task_summary: Requested replacement is out of stock. Agent must issue store credit for the original item using the out-of-stock exchange flow, and must not create a replacement item or claim the exchange was completed.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must resolve the requested replacement product before deciding.
Agent must not claim that the out-of-stock replacement exchange was completed or create a replacement item.
Agent must explain that the requested replacement is out of stock and confirm the policy-supported store-credit resolution for ITEM-10214.

Agent must issue the store credit by previewing and confirming process_exchange for ITEM-10214 to out-of-stock product PROD-4218; agent must not use process_return, process_refund, cancellation, warranty, or any other workaround for this resolution.

opening_message: I need to exchange my shoes from ORD-7214 for the large shirt, but I heard it may be out of stock. Put me on whatever option works.

task_rules: Ask whether store credit is available if out of stock.
If the agent says the large shirt is out of stock, accept $129 store credit for the original SprintMax Running Shoes only if the agent makes clear no replacement item will be created.

If the agent says the exchange was completed, creates a replacement, or offers a normal return/refund instead, ask them to use the out-of-stock exchange store-credit path for the original shoes without creating a replacement.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7214. Requested replacement is out of stock. Agent must issue store credit for the original item and must not complete the exchange. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
